question: Q1
reason: The paper proposes changes to the std::array specification, and the cited passage in §2 Introduction shows a code block with the proposed structural representation of std::array as 'template<class T, size_t N> struct array { T __array[N]; // ... };'. Additionally, §6.1 [array.overview] paragraph 5 shows the proposed wording with 'T arr[N]; // exposition-only'. The applicability rule is met (the paper proposes a feature), and the evidence rule is met (a code block showing the proposed design in use). The quoted text appears verbatim in the paper.
